# Colony Ship Manifest: INS Prometheus

The INS Prometheus is the largest colony vessel ever constructed, designed to transport settlers to the newly terraformed world of Haven in the Periphery.

Passenger capacity: 10,000 settlers in cryogenic suspension, plus a rotating crew complement of 200.

The ship carries a complete industrial seed package: molecular assemblers, fusion reactor components, agricultural bio-banks, and a positronic administrative unit for initial colony governance. Transit time to Haven via the Alpha-7 hyperspace corridor is approximately 3.2 standard years.

Commander Lise Meitner reports that embarkation from Terminus Station is proceeding on schedule. All cryogenic pods have passed final inspection and the primary drive has been test-fired at 94% rated capacity.
